positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration of a celestial raccoon sitting amidst stylized cosmic elements. The raccoon is rendered with thick, clean lines and a dynamic silhouette, looking curious and slightly mischievous. Background details include crescent moons, stylized stars, nebulae swirls, and constellations, all drawn with a modern, geometric art style. The composition is centered and balanced, suitable for apparel printing. Use a highly contrasted, limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, soft gold, and crisp white. Clean vector aesthetic, flat design influence, perfect for textile printing, high detail, high contrast.
